task: Canonical solve of the non-uniform k-connectivity MILP (model.py) at the committed operating point, during Aletheia adoption. Executes docs/decisions.md D02.

seeds.derivation: single fixed seed for topology placement (random.seed(SEED))

expectation: Written before the solve: the instance is feasible and yields a single finite objective tau (max per-node energy); tau is reproducible across processes while the exact routing is not.
provenance_note: Genuine run (not retroactive). git_tree_clean_at_launch is false because model.py and this scaffold were uncommitted when the solve ran; the script's sha256 pins the exact model version. arch_native_verified is false: the interpreter is x86_64 under Rosetta on Apple Silicon, not native arm64 — recorded honestly per run-provenance/numerical-determinism rather than omitted. solutions.csv is one optimal routing among several; tau is the gated invariant.
